topic: The wind chime in my backyard rings only on still nights and the pattern is Morse code for my middle name
title: The Wind Chime in My Backyard Rings Only When There Is No Wind | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The wind chime in my backyard rings only on still nights. The local weather station reports zero wind.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single brass wind chime hanging motionless under a wooden porch overhang at night, deep shadow behind, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small backyard. Brass chime my aunt gave me. Hung from the porch rafter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small fenced backyard at dusk with a wooden porch and a single brass wind chime visible hanging from the eave, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drink coffee on the porch at six AM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a ceramic coffee mug resting on a wooden porch railing at dawn, dim early morning light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed last May. Perfect still nights. Chime ringing for thirty minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a brass wind chime hanging perfectly still in a quiet backyard at night, no wind motion visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked the anemometer on my roof.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small white anemometer on a residential rooftop at night, the cups motionless, dim sky behind, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a backyard at night with a wind chime hanging from a porch, leaves on the lawn completely undisturbed, dim moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Took the chime down. Hung a piece of string in its place.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single piece of cotton string hanging from a porch eave hook, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: String never moved. Hung the chime again. Same pattern. Same nights.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a brass wind chime back in place hanging perfectly motionless under a porch eave, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Recorded the audio for a month. Played it for a musician friend.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone propped on a porch railing recording a wind chime, the audio recording app visible on the screen, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She said the pattern was Morse code. Spelled my middle name letter by letter.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a laptop screen displaying audio waveforms with Morse code dots and dashes annotated above the peaks, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Took the chime down. Stored it in the basement.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass wind chime resting on a wooden basement shelf beside cardboard boxes, dim single bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I can hear it ringing through the closed basement door at night.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a dim hallway at night looking at a closed wooden basement door, faint glow visible at the bottom seam, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing
